sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْفُحُوصَاتُ الطِّبِّيَّةُ الدَّوْرِيَّةُ خَطَّ الدِّفَاعِ الْأَوَّلَ فِي الْكَشْفِ الْمُبَكِّرِ عَنِ الْأَمْرَاضِ الصَّامِتَةِ.
sentences.translation: Periodični medicinski pregledi predstavljaju prvu liniju odbrane u ranom otkrivanju tihih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Periodic medical check-ups represent the first line of defense in the early detection of silent diseases.

sentences.arabic: يَتَجَاهَلُ الْكَثِيرُونَ زِيَارَةَ الطَّبِيبِ حَتَّى تَظْهَرَ الْأَعْرَاضُ، مِمَّا قَدْ يَجْعَلُ الْعِلَاجَ أَكْثَرَ صُعُوبَةً وَتَعْقِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ignorišu posjetu ljekaru dok se ne pojave simptomi, što liječenje može učiniti težim i složenijim.
sentences.translationEn: Many ignore visiting the doctor until symptoms appear, which can make treatment more difficult and complex.

sentences.arabic: يُوَفِّرُ الطِّبُّ الْحَدِيثُ تِقْنِيَّاتٍ مُتَطَوِّرَةً لِلْمَسْحِ الطِّبِّيِّ تُسَاعِدُ فِي تَشْخِيصِ الْمَشَاكِلِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ فِي مَرَاحِلِهَا الْأُولَى.
sentences.translation: Moderna medicina pruža napredne tehnologije medicinskog skeniranja koje pomažu u dijagnostici zdravstvenih problema u njihovim ranim fazama.
sentences.translationEn: Modern medicine provides advanced medical screening technologies that help in diagnosing health problems in their early stages.

sentences.arabic: بِالْإِضَافَةِ إِلَى الْفَحْصِ الْبَدَنِيِّ، يَجِبُ اسْتِشَارَةُ الصَّيْدَلِيِّ حَوْلَ الِاسْتِخْدَامِ الصَّحِيحِ لِلْأَدْوِيَةِ وَآثَارِهَا الْجَانِبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pored fizičkog pregleda, potrebno je konsultovati farmaceuta o pravilnoj upotrebi lijekova i njihovim nuspojavama.
sentences.translationEn: In addition to the physical exam, one must consult the pharmacist about the correct use of medications and their side effects.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَبَنِّي نَمَطِ حَيَاةٍ وِقَائِيٍّ يَضْمَنُ جَوْدَةَ حَيَاةٍ أَفْضَلَ وَيُقَلِّلُ مِنَ الْأَعْبَاءِ عَلَى النِّظَامِ الصِّحِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Usvajanje preventivnog načina života garantuje bolji kvalitet života i smanjuje opterećenje zdravstvenog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Adopting a preventive lifestyle ensures a better quality of life and reduces the burden on the healthcare system.
